title: Fixing Broken HTML Anchor Tags with Invalid Target Attributes

statement.markdown: The goal is to create a function that checks if an HTML anchor tag is valid. An anchor tag is valid if it has a target attribute, but the target attribute must be one of the following: _blank, _self, _parent, _top. If the target attribute is not one of these, the function should return false. Otherwise, the function should return true. The input will be a string representing the HTML anchor tag.
statement.inputFormat: A string representing the HTML anchor tag, e.g. 'Link'
statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the anchor tag is valid
statement.notes: The input string will not contain any other HTML tags or attributes besides the anchor tag and the target attribute.

hints.text: Check the target attribute of the anchor tag
